label: 1501 CE
era_summary: Year 1501 (MDI) was a common year starting on Friday in the Julian calendar. It was the first year of the 16th century.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1501: Turkey-Venice, 1498-1503; France, Spain-Milan, Naples, 1500-02. Maddison records GDP/capita 2549 (ITA, 1501) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
